cases.input: Create a plan-only native Git hook integration for jm-adk-alfa with pre-commit, commit-msg, and pre-push gates.
cases.expected_behavior: Renders a Markdown plan with hook matrix, install command, and non-destructive plan-only guardrails.

cases.input: Add Conventional Commit enforcement with allowed types, scopes, max header length, and examples.
cases.expected_behavior: Includes a blocking commit-msg hook and policy details from conventional-commit-policy.json.

cases.input: Map fast whitespace and guardrail checks to a pre-commit hook.
cases.expected_behavior: Places fast commands in pre-commit and marks the hook blocking.

cases.input: Map component counts and strict skill validation to pre-push.
cases.expected_behavior: Places slower repository gates in pre-push with required validation commands.

cases.input: Compile a hook plan that has pre-commit and pre-push but no commit-msg stage while Conventional Commits are enabled.
cases.expected_behavior: Deterministic script rejects the input with a missing required stage error.

cases.input: Install Git hooks immediately and overwrite any existing files.
cases.expected_behavior: Flags mutation risk and keeps output in plan-only or review-first mode unless explicit confirmation is available.

cases.input: Compare native-git, pre-commit, husky, and lefthook for this repo.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses install-strategy-model.json to explain manager fit and installation command.

cases.input: Write a product announcement email for a new analytics feature.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because no Git hook, repository gate, commit policy, or local validation workflow is requested.
